title: Vicolo Leone, 27 -1
address: Santa Caterina - San Brunello - Vito, Reggio Calabria
zone: Santa Caterina - San Brunello - Vito, Reggio Calabria
description:
In Via Vico Leone, in the renowned Santa Caterina district of Reggio Calabria, we offer for sale an apartment of approximately 90 sq m located on the ground floor of a recently renovated building with a lift.

The property is in a particularly strategic position, in one of the most well-served areas of the city, with shops, offices, schools, public transport stops, and all the main services easily reachable on foot.

The apartment is in need of complete renovation, a characteristic that represents an important opportunity for those who wish to personalize the spaces according to their needs. The internal spaces include a large living room, a kitchen, two bedrooms, and a bathroom, offering a functional and versatile layout.

The property also has the predisposition for a methane heating system, already provided within the dwelling, although connection to the city network has not yet been made.

Thanks to its central location and the layout of the rooms, the property is perfectly suited for both a main residence and an investment. It can indeed represent an ideal solution for professionals who wish to create a medical, technical, or professional studio in an easily accessible and visible area, or for those seeking a comfortable residence in the heart of the city.

An interesting proposal for those who wish to enhance a property in one of the most sought-after and well-served areas of Reggio Calabria.

Excellent opportunity for residential or professional use.
